entries.name: Flat Calm
entries.description: No wind, no waves, no progress. Crew morale drops and small problems become loud ones.

entries.name: Clear Blue Day
entries.description: Perfect visibility and steady travel. The sea feels endless but peaceful.

entries.name: Glittering Swell
entries.description: Sunlight flashes across rolling waves. Travel continues, but loose cargo shifts below deck.

entries.name: Cloud Bank Ahead
entries.description: A wall of cloud approaches. The captain must decide whether to skirt it or sail through.

entries.name: Night Chill
entries.description: The temperature drops after sunset. Watch crews report odd sounds beyond the hull.

entries.name: Crosswind
entries.description: The ship must tack carefully. Travel is slower unless the crew handles the sails well.

entries.name: Black Rain
entries.description: Dark rain stains the deck and leaves a bitter taste. The crew mutters about bad omens.

entries.name: Deep Water Silence
entries.description: The sea becomes strangely still. No birds. No fish. No sound but the ship.
